name: Sandbakelse
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg. Beat in the cardamom and flour.
3. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for several hours.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Lightly butter mini muffin tins.
6. Press the dough into the tins, making a well with your finger.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until just beginning to brown.
8. Let cool on wire racks.
9. Fill with jelly or jam and sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
